name: LN882x
description: Configuration for the LibreTiny platform for ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Board
config_entries.description: The PlatformIO board ID that should be used. Choose the appropriate board from this list (the icon next to the name can be used to copy the board ID). This affects CPU selection and some internal settings - make sure to choose the right CPU. If unsure about the choice of a particular board, choose a generic board such as generic-bk7231n-qfn32-tuya.

config_entries.label: Framework
config_entries.description: Options for the underlying framework used by ESPHome. LibreTiny platform releases. Defaults to recommended. Additional values.

config_entries.label: Debug
config_entries.description: Modules to enable LibreTiny debugging for. Refer to LibreTiny/Configuration for more information - some modules are enabled by default. One or more of wifi, client, server, ssl, ota, fdb, mdns, lwip, lwip_assert. Specifying none will disable all modules. You can also combine none with one or more of the modules.

config_entries.label: GPIO Recover
config_entries.description: Disable JTAG/SWD debugging peripherals. This may be needed to free GPIOs that should be used for other functions. Defaults to true.

config_entries.label: Loglevel
config_entries.description: Logging level for LibreTiny core. Controls the output of logging messages from the core (doesn't affect ESPHome logger!). These messages are only visible on the physical UART. One of verbose, trace (same as verbose ), debug, info, warn (default), error, fatal, none.

config_entries.label: Sdk Silent
config_entries.description: Define the SDK logging "silent mode". This disables messages from vendor SDKs, which makes UART output more readable, but can hide some error messages. This affects the physical UART port only. Refer to LibreTiny/Configuration for more information.

config_entries.label: UART Port
config_entries.description: Choose the default UART port of the framework. This affects LibreTiny logging messages, as well as the default port for ESPHome logger (e.g. if you don't specify any other). One of 0, 1, 2. The default value is chip-specific and is chosen by LibreTiny appropriately.

config_entries.label: Family
config_entries.description: The family of LibreTiny-supported microcontrollers that is used on this board. One of bk7231n, bk7231t, rtl8710b, rtl8720c, bk7251, bk7231q, ln882hki. Defaults to the variant that is detected from the board, if a board that's unknown to ESPHome is used, this option is mandatory. It's recommended not to include this option.
